title: NetTerm
summary: SSH / telnet / USB-serial / shell terminal with profiles, VPN, macros and file injection.
description: A pocket terminal for network gear: SSH, telnet, USB-serial console (picocom) and local shell. Connection profiles with OS-managed VPN, per-profile SSH key and color theme, session logging with search, quick-send macros, charset-auto-detect file injection with wait-for-prompt, scrollback with search and line copy/paste, full SGR colour, and a switchable EN/JA UI.
